title: EKP Final Acceptance Output
description: Codex final verdict comparing delivered code against the ORIGINAL build.md (not the plan). Strict-mode: every object has additionalProperties=false and every property is required (use defaults for not-applicable).

delivered.description: True iff EVERY gate in build.md frontmatter has status=met with verified evidence.

gate_results.description: One entry per gate from build.md frontmatter. No gate may be skipped.

gate_description.description: Verbatim from build.md frontmatter for traceability.

evidence.description: Concrete proof: file:line, test output, command execution. 'Looks correct' is NOT evidence.

concerns.description: Latent risks even if status=met (e.g., 'works but no error handling for malformed input'). Empty string if none.

summary.description: <=300 words: overall delivery assessment for the human reviewer.

blockers.description: Specific reasons to NOT ship. Empty iff delivered=true.

non_blocking_followups.description: Improvements suggested but not required for this delivery.

recommendation.description: ship=delivery accepted; fix_blockers_and_re_run=address listed blockers and re-run Accept; redesign=plan is fundamentally off, go back to Plan phase.
